## Meeting Purpose

[Review content research and strategy for hyperexponential's SEO-driven blog content creation with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content clusters refined to 4 key areas: AI Transformation, Comparing Solutions, Python/Technical, and Insurance Operations](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [David to approve 5-10 initial blog topics for calibration, considering search volume and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Integration with Framer CMS planned for automated content publishing pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Current blog structure to be maintained for SEO benefits (domain authority: 29/100)](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up image generation process aligned with hx's visual identity](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [Refined from 5 to 4 clusters based on previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Clusters: AI Transformation, Comparing Solutions, Python/Technical, Insurance Operations](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Aida to update search volume data for all keywords in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [David to review and approve 5-10 initial topics for production start](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Content Production Pipeline

  - [GrowthX to generate one initial blog for voice/tone alignment](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Plan to scale up production after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Balance between high and low volume keywords for targeted audience reach](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Each blog post typically ranks for 10-15 keywords, increasing potential traffic](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### Website Integration and SEO

  - [Current plan: Manual publishing to Storyblock, then Frankie to review](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Future goal: Automated pipeline to Framer CMS](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Recommendation to keep content on existing blog structure (/blog) for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Discussion on potential separation of product updates vs. educational content](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### Image Generation for Blog Posts

  - [GrowthX to set up image generation process](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [David to provide Figma file or Google Drive with visual identity guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Images to be generated based on article content](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Content Refresh and Migration

  - [Potential project to rewrite and improve 30 existing articles for new blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [GrowthX can set up a "refresher pipeline" for this purpose](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Priority given to new content creation over refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [Currently tracking 175 prompts related to hx's market presence](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [hx in second position behind Ernex in competitive presence](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [2% citation rate in AI responses (note: LLMs prefer third-party content)](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Ability to track visibility across different topics and LLM platforms](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

## Next Steps

  - David to provide:
    1.  Competitive analysis documentation
    2.  Connection to design team for image generation guidelines
    3.  Approval for 5-10 initial blog topics
  - GrowthX to:
    1.  Update search volume data in Airtable content calendar
    2.  Set up image generation process once guidelines are received
    3.  Prepare for initial blog post creation
  - [Erik to coordinate with hx team for Framer CMS integration (API token, access)](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Aida to send request for Framer access and dev team integration](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for Friday (Monday's meeting cancelled)](https://fathom.video/share/5xQrp3GodsakuPVK4e6PMC5TbY82DWEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
